creator: dimitry@andric.com
text:
Okay, please try the following patch instead.  This has a check for the
correct __FreeBSD_versions in the patch-server::dhcpd.c file.  For me,
this builds on 7-STABLE, but I am after the jail API MFC...

If anyone can confirm this builds on e.g. 7-RELEASE, or anything before
the MFC, please let us know.
